message:
✨ Global font size controls + scroll and tile fixes (#152)

Font size controls:
- Add −/size/+ control in toolbar between tile and attach buttons
- Cmd+/Cmd- to increase/decrease, Cmd+0 to reset to 14px
- Range: 8px–24px, persisted to localStorage
- Applied to all terminal sessions simultaneously
- New terminals inherit current global font size

Tile mode:
- Suppress PTY resize for all tiled terminals (prevents SIGWINCH
  causing agent re-render / content duplication)
- Tile font derived from global size: -3px for 2+ tiles, -1px for single
- Restore global font size on tile exit

Scroll:
- Block ALL wheel events on .xterm (no events reach xterm.js)
- Manual term.scrollLines() for xterm.js scrollback only
- Eliminates rocket scroll completely (no mouse escape seqs to tmux)
- Throttle at 120ms, 3 lines per event

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
